sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84700" key="poluge/wrgos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-γέωργος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">farming much land,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:69:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">69.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
